title: PowerClaim
description: A revolutionary and innovative land management system that has been designed with ease-of-use and player satisfaction in mind.
body:
![Easy-to-use block based claim plugin](https://camo.githubusercontent.com/4e8b0ebe1d715adeffd3996686ff2b879f88f2ac07b7e1fceb141f3558c531b4/68747470733a2f2f7376656e61722e6e6c2f696d616765732f506f776572436c61696d2f62616e6e65722e706e67)
# About
PowerClaim is a revolutionary and innovative land management system that has been designed with ease-of-use and player satisfaction in mind. The system is intuitive and user-friendly with visual feedback, providing players with an interface that they can quickly grasp and use to protect their buildings and resources against griefing and other malicious activities.

Players can manage their claims with ease and protect their buildings and resources against griefing and other malicious activities. Whether you're a seasoned player or a newbie, PowerClaim is the ideal land management system that will provide you with all the tools you need to protect your assets and enjoy your gaming experience to the fullest.

# Comands & Permissions
- **/claim**
    - Permission: powerclaim.cmd.powerclaim
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Basic command that shows the player's claim quota in blocks

- **/claim help**
    - Permission: powerclaim.cmd.powerclaim
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Show a list of commands

- **/claim stats**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.admin
    - Default: op
    - Description: Show stats about the plugin

- **/claim abandon**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Abandon a claim

- **/claim flags**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Show a overview of all flags and their values

- **/claim flags <flagname> <true/false>**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Change a flags value

- **/claim list**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Show a list of your claims

- **/claim tool**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Get the claim management tool, used to create / resize claims

- **/claim trust**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Show the trusted players of the current claim

- **/claim trust <player>**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Trust a player on the claim

- **/claim untrust <player>**
    - Permission: powerclaim.claim.use
    - Default: yes
    - Description: Untrust a player on the claim
